signed_representation: canonical ASCII JSON with signature_base64 removed
artifact_uniqueness: canonical paths, artifact roles, and resolved regular-file device/inode identities are each unique
path_admission: open artifact root, every relative parent component, and final files with no-follow descriptor-relative traversal; reject symlinked roots, parents, final files, and non-regular files
admission_race_rule: hash an opened descriptor and require unchanged device, inode, mode, size, mtime, and ctime before/after; snapshot the no-follow trusted public key before signature verification
rollback_rule: rollback_index must strictly exceed the accepted device index
activation_rule: the updater stages only the inactive slot; boot success promotes it
